subject: RE: Meridian Technologies — Enterprise Contract Renewal

messages.body:
Hi Roberto,

Following up on our call from two weeks ago. Our procurement board meets on June 13th and I need the formal proposal with updated pricing before then. We're looking at the 120-seat Enterprise tier deployment as discussed.

Can you confirm the pricing, payment terms, and the dedicated onboarding timeline? We're also wondering if you can match the rate we were quoted — I believe it was $22/seat based on our conversation with Sarah Chen.

Please let me know if you need anything from our side.

Best,
Lisa Park
Head of Procurement, Meridian Technologies

Hi Lisa,

Thank you for following up. I'm confirming the pricing details now with our sales leadership and will have a formal proposal to you by end of day tomorrow.

To confirm my understanding: 120 seats at Enterprise tier, with the custom rate that was discussed. I'll also include the onboarding timeline — we can commit to a 4-week dedicated onboarding with engineering support included.

For payment terms, can you confirm whether Net 30 or Net 60 is preferred? I want to make sure the proposal matches your procurement requirements exactly.

Best,
Roberto Leal
Account Manager, Acme E-commerce

Hi Roberto,

Net 60 would be ideal for us — our AP cycle is 45 days so Net 30 is always a scramble. If you can include Net 60, that would be greatly appreciated and would make this an easy approval internally.

Looking forward to the proposal.

Best,
Lisa

Hi Lisa,

I apologize for the delay in getting this to you — I've been coordinating with our leadership team to finalize the terms.

Please find the attached proposal for 120 seats at $22/seat/month on our Enterprise tier with Net 60 payment terms and a 4-week dedicated onboarding program. All terms are as discussed.

Please let me know if you have any questions. I'm available for a call today or tomorrow to walk through the proposal.

Best,
Roberto Leal
Account Manager, Acme E-commerce

Roberto,

Thank you — received the proposal. I'll review it today and share with our CFO. I'll come back to you with any questions before the June 13th board meeting.

The terms look good at first glance. Net 60 and the dedicated onboarding are exactly what we needed.

Best,
Lisa
